analysis.object: T613: Multimodal and Embodied AI depth analysis

sensory_loops.description: Embodiment adds EML-2 measurement loops: proprioception, vision, touch feedback
sensory_loops.reason: Embodied AI: continuous EML-2 sensorimotor measurement loops vs language-only EML-3

depth_transitions.description: Robotic systems approach EML-3/inf boundary: action -> consequence -> adaptation
depth_transitions.reason: Embodied AI: closed-loop EML-3 adaptation; closer to TYPE3 threshold than pure LLMs

still_no_qualia.description: Embodiment adds EML-2 measurement; does not provide TYPE3 architectural jump
still_no_qualia.reason: Embodied AI: richer EML-2/3 but TYPE3 gap remains; qualia not achieved by adding sensors
